summary: Completed comprehensive audit of SOAP Notes app. Backend APIs working well (90% success rate), frontend UI flows functional with minor modal overlay issue. All core features tested including 4-step wizard, muscle map, Quick Select presets, and client management.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks interactions after opening
ui_bugs.symptoms: Modal opens but clicking elements behind modal causes timeout errors

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints working (9/10 tests passed)
Step 1 - Client Intake: All form fields load and are editable
Step 1 - Client Intake: First Name, Last Name, Email, DOB fields work
Step 1 - Client Intake: Pain level slider (0-10 scale) functional
Step 1 - Client Intake: Session duration dropdown works
Step 1 - Client Intake: PDF upload dropzone visible
Step 1 - Client Intake: Next button navigates to Step 2
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Male/Female toggle switches correctly
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Anterior/Posterior toggle switches views
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Show muscle polygons checkbox works
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Quick Select panel opens and closes
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Quick Select presets work (8 markers placed for Upper Back Tension)
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Marked Areas list updates with muscle names
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Clear All Markers button present
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Navigation Back/Next buttons present
Header: New Session button resets the form to Step 1
Header: Clients button opens client browser modal
Client Browser: Modal opens (with overlay issue)
Client Browser: Search input is functional
Direct step navigation works via JavaScript
Step 3 - Session Notes: Technique checkboxes are present
Step 3 - Session Notes: Session notes textarea is editable
Step 3 - Session Notes: Post-session pain level input works
Step 3 - Session Notes: Generate SOAP button is visible
Step 4 - SOAP Notes: Export PDF, Copy All Text, Regenerate buttons present
Step 4 - SOAP Notes: All 5 SOAP sections (S,O,A,P,N) are present
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Configure OpenAI API key for SOAP generation functionality. 2. Fix modal overlay issue in Client Browser - modal blocks interactions with underlying elements causing timeout errors.
